name: gramota
description: Open-source TypeScript SDK for the EU Digital Identity Wallet.

scripts.test:live: turbo run build && EUDI_LIVE=1 vitest run packages/e2e/tests/interop/
scripts.test:all: turbo run build && EUDI_LIVE=1 vitest run
scripts.demo:self-loop: turbo run build --filter=@gramota/demo && node packages/demo/dist/index.js self-loop
scripts.demo:eu-pid: turbo run build --filter=@gramota/demo && node packages/demo/dist/index.js eu-pid
scripts.demo:list: turbo run build --filter=@gramota/demo && node packages/demo/dist/index.js list
